mission.title: opentofu: Add support for `for_each` in the `import` block
mission.description: Add support for `for_each` in the `import` block. Requested by 34+ users.

steps.title: Check OpenTofu installation
steps.description:
Verify your OpenTofu version:
```bash
tofu version
```
This feature requires OpenTofu installed locally. Install via `brew install opentofu` or download from https://opentofu.org/docs/intro/install/.

steps.title: Understand the feature context
steps.description:
### Use Cases

The `import` block could benefit greatly from supporting `for_each`. 

Currently, importing resources that are using `for_each` is not possible / hard using the `import` block for them.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Add support for `for_each` in the `import` block
steps.description:
Related to https://github.com/opentofu/opentofu/issues/1033

Current plan for implementing `for_each` for the `import` block:
1. Prepare `ImportTarget` types and codebase for more dynamic addresses (addresses that are not fully known from the get-go) **<--- You are here**
2. Allow for having a more
```hcl
import {
  for_each = local.bucket_ids
  id = each.value.id
  to = aws_s3_bucket.bucket[each.value.key]
}

resource "aws_s3_bucket" "bucket" {
  for_each = local.bucket_ids
  ...
}
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the feature is working as expected:
```bash
tofu version
tofu validate
tofu plan
```
Confirm that the feature described in "Add support for `for_each` in the `import` block" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
Related to https://github.com/opentofu/opentofu/issues/1033

Current plan for implementing `for_each` for the `import` block:
1. Prepare `ImportTarget` types and codebase for more dynamic addresses (addresses that are not fully known from the get-go) **<--- You are here**
2. Allow for having a more dynamic address in the `to` field of an `import` block
3.

prerequisites.description: OpenTofu CLI installed (brew install opentofu or download from opentofu.org). Terraform provider credentials as needed for the specific configuration.
